\tzpentry{ID3655}{Vortex Propagator Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3655 introduces Vortex Propagator Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} ds^2_{\text{vortex}} = -\left(1-\frac{2GM}{rc^2}\right)dt^2 + \frac{4GMa\sin^2\theta}{rc^2}dtd\phi + \left[\frac{r^2}{\Delta} + \mathcal{Q}_{\text{acc}}(r,t)\right]dr^2 \end{equation}
